nasb.text: The clods of the valley will gently cover him; Moreover, all men will follow after him, While countless ones go before him.

esv.text: The clods of the valley are sweet to him; all mankind follows after him, and those who go before him are innumerable.

cnv.text: 他以谷中的土塊為甘甜， 所有的人跟在他後面， 走在他前面的不計其數。

ccb.text: 他们在谷中的沃土安息， 送葬的人前呼后拥，不计其数。
